items.name: ProxmoxMCP-Plus
items.description: Use MCP and OpenAPI to safely control Proxmox VE VMs, LXCs, backups, and snapshots from LLMs and AI agents.

items.name: signetai
items.description: Local-first identity, memory, and secrets for AI agents. Portable state across models and harnesses.

items.name: pentestagent
items.description: PentestAgent is an AI agent framework for black-box security testing, supporting bug bounty, red-team, and penetration testing workflows.

items.name: executor
items.description: The missing integration layer for AI agents. Let them call any OpenAPI / MCP / GraphQL / custom js functions in secure environment.

items.name: goose
items.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

items.name: Vibe-Skills
items.description: Vibe-Skills is an all-in-one AI skills package. It seamlessly integrates expert-level capabilities and context management into a general-purpose skills package， enabling any AI agent to instantly upgrade its functionality—eliminating the friction of fragmented tools and complex harnesses.

items.name: cccc
items.description: Coordinate your coding agents like a group chat — read receipts, delivery tracking, and remote ops from your phone. One pip install, zero infrastructure. A production‑minded orchestrator for 24/7 workflow

items.name: sim
items.description: Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

items.name: agent-vault
items.description: A HTTP credential proxy and vault for AI agents

items.name: codedb
items.description: Zig code intelligence server and MCP toolset for AI agents. Fast tree, outline, symbol, search, read, edit, deps, snapshot, and remote GitHub repo queries.
